entries.title: Workbench: Distributions & Scheduled Delivery
entries.description: Schedule automated delivery of Workbench canvases to recipients via email. Configure timezone, frequency, and recipient lists from the Communications Center. Resend and delivery reliability improvements ensure consistent delivery.

entries.title: Workbench: Global Sharing
entries.description: Share Workbench canvases globally with other users in your organization so teams can collaborate on the same dashboard views and insights.

entries.title: CohiChat AI Assistant
entries.description: An AI-powered conversational assistant embedded throughout the platform. Ask questions about your loan data, get metric explanations, and receive guidance — available in the Workbench sidebar and as a standalone Data Chat page.

entries.title: Cohi Daily Briefings (AI Audio News Brief)
entries.description: Listen to an AI-generated audio briefing covering your organization's key metrics, market conditions, and pipeline highlights. Briefings can be generated on-demand or scheduled nightly. Ask follow-up questions by voice or text during playback.

entries.title: Daily Brief Newsletter
entries.description: Subscribe to automated daily email newsletters featuring market snapshots, industry news (MBA, Freddie Mac, etc.), pipeline digests, and tracked metrics. Configure delivery schedule and preview content before sending.

entries.title: Research Lab Improvements
entries.description: An AI-powered research workspace for deep-dive analysis. Ask complex questions about your data and receive structured reports with findings and drill-downs. Includes a simplified interaction mode and guided onboarding tour for new users.

entries.title: Fallout Alerts with Email Notifications
entries.description: Automatically notify loan officers about high-risk loans via email. Configure minimum risk score thresholds, frequency (realtime, daily digest, weekly digest), and target specific loan officers or managers. Loan officers can respond directly from the email with Resolved, Working on it, or Need help — and admins can track all responses in the LO Responses tab.

entries.title: Fallout Alert Single-Loan Sending
entries.description: Send a fallout alert for an individual loan directly from the Loan Drilldown modal. Add extra recipients and a personal message when alerting a loan officer about a specific high-risk loan.

entries.title: Sales Scorecard Overview
entries.description: A high-level summary view of sales performance with custom date bar/column selection, trend analysis, and direct Workbench widget integration for tracking sales metrics over time.

entries.title: High Performers Dashboard
entries.description: Identify top-performing branches and loan officers ranked by funded loans, closed loans, or applications taken. Includes volume, units, and product mix breakdowns (government, conventional, refi, purchase) across multiple time periods.

entries.title: Actors Dashboard
entries.description: Configurable dashboard showing loan status distribution, KPIs, and up to four tables of actors (loan officers, processors, underwriters, closers, branches) with volume, turn times, and approval/denial rates.

entries.title: Pricing Dashboard
entries.description: A dedicated Pricing Dashboard with full page navigation and Workbench widget support for analyzing pricing drivers, margin performance, and variance. Includes expanded actor and entity filtering, custom column configuration, and CSV export.

entries.title: Pipeline Analysis
entries.description: Full pipeline analysis dashboard and Workbench widgets including historical snapshots, workflow-oriented views, and 10-year Treasury rate overlay for contextualizing pipeline changes against rate movements.

entries.title: Loan Complexity Dashboard
entries.description: Dedicated loan complexity widgets with individual selection filtering to isolate high-friction loans and monitor complexity shifts. Available as a standalone page and as Workbench widgets.

entries.title: Lock Stratification
entries.description: Segment lock behavior with dynamic filtering and compare performance by custom dimensions. Available as a standalone page and integrated into Workbench.

entries.title: Workflow Conversion
entries.description: Track loan progression through workflow milestones with conversion rate analysis. Supports additional filters, broader date handling, and loan detail drilldowns. Milestone settings persist when saving Workbench canvases.

entries.title: Credit Risk Management
entries.description: Analyze FICO, LTV, and DTI distributions with loan mix breakdowns by type, purpose, and occupancy. Drill into individual risk buckets and export data. Includes modal-based loan detail cards for deeper investigation.

entries.title: Loan Detail Table
entries.description: A searchable, sortable table of all loans with fully customizable columns — add, remove, and reorder fields like FICO, LTV, channel, branch, loan officer, and more. Filter by period and channel, drill into individual loans, and export to CSV.

entries.title: Loan Officer Drilldown Modal
entries.description: Click any loan officer name to view a detailed modal with total, active, and closed loan counts, pull-through rates, volume breakdowns, risk analysis, and their full loan list with optional AI insights.

entries.title: Sidebar Navigation: Search, Pin, and Sort
entries.description: The sidebar now supports route search to quickly find any page, plus pin and unpin dashboard shortcuts. Pinned items can be sorted for a personalized navigation experience.

entries.title: Consolidated Top Navigation and Layout
entries.description: Dashboard navigation and top bar behavior have been streamlined across all scorecards and performance pages. All dashboards are consolidated into a unified navigation structure with a top bar search for faster page switching.

entries.title: Canvas-Only User Access Mode
entries.description: Tenant admins can assign a canvas-only role that restricts users to Workbench routes only, enabling safe collaboration with stakeholders who only need to view shared dashboards.

entries.title: Direction-Based Prediction Zones
entries.description: Fallout predictions now use direction-based zones for denied loans, differentiating between improving and deteriorating risk trajectories. VA loan rules have also been updated so that higher LTV is no longer treated as an automatic denial signal.

entries.title: Entity and Actor Selection Filters
entries.description: Dashboards now support specific entity and actor selection filters, allowing you to narrow views to individual loan officers, processors, branches, or other actors across scorecards and analytics pages.

entries.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Enforcement
entries.description: Tenant admins can now enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users in their organization, adding an additional layer of security to platform access.

entries.title: Help Center and In-App Guidance
entries.description: A built-in Help Center with searchable articles organized by category, role-based learning paths, and guided tours for new users. Content covers navigation, dashboards, Workbench, Research Lab, and all major analytics features.
